fields.name: overdue
fields.label: Overdue alerts
fields.description: When a debt passes its due date

notes: As-built the four toggles are local-only StatefulWidget booleans (_payments/_overdue/_delivery/_weekly, defaults true/true/true/false, lines ~23-26) with NO seam read or write and no persistence. Ruled SERVE-PERSISTED (scan-map rulings.servePersisted): extracted as a real backend resource so backend push (owner-only surface) honors these preferences. Field names derived from the toggle state vars; labels/subs captured from the four ToggleRow widgets (~40-64). A single persisted NotificationPreferences row per business/owner; update toggles one flag and persists the full preference set. No loading/empty/error UI states are handled as-built (toggles always render).
